name: gamemood
description: GameMood - AI-Powered PC Game Recommendation Hub. Run 'npm run dev' to start both client and server.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" --names "CLIENT,SERVER" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm start --prefix server"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
